title: Canon EOS R5
description: Professional mirrorless camera with a 45MP sensor and 8K video recording capability. Delivers outstanding image quality and fast autofocus performance. Ideal for high-end photography and cinematic video production.

title: Sony Alpha A7 IV
description: Full-frame mirrorless camera with advanced autofocus and excellent dynamic range. Perfect for both photography and videography. A great choice for professionals and creators.

title: Nikon Z6 II
description: High-performance mirrorless camera with dual processors and fast shooting speed. Performs exceptionally well in low-light conditions. Suitable for professionals and enthusiasts.

title: Fujifilm X-T5
description: Compact and stylish mirrorless camera with beautiful color science. Excellent for street and portrait photography. Loved by creative photographers.

title: Sony ZV-E10
description: Vlogging-focused camera with flip screen and great autofocus. Lightweight and easy to carry for content creators. Perfect for YouTube and social media videos.

title: Canon EOS 90D
description: Powerful DSLR camera with high-resolution sensor and fast performance. Ideal for sports and wildlife photography. Reliable and durable build quality.

title: Nikon D7500
description: Mid-range DSLR with strong performance and excellent image quality. Offers good battery life and durability. Suitable for semi-professional photographers.

title: GoPro Hero 12
description: Action camera designed for adventure and extreme conditions. Shoots high-quality video with stabilization. Perfect for travel, sports, and outdoor activities.

title: DJI Osmo Pocket 3
description: Compact handheld camera with built-in gimbal stabilization. Great for smooth cinematic videos on the go. Ideal for vloggers and travelers.

title: Panasonic Lumix GH6
description: Professional video-focused mirrorless camera with advanced recording features. Delivers excellent video quality and flexibility. Best for filmmakers and content creators.

description: Popular gaming console with a vast library of games. Offers smooth performance and great graphics. Perfect for budget gamers.

title: Nintendo Switch

title: Asus ROG Gaming Laptop
description: High-performance gaming laptop with powerful GPU and cooling system. Designed for smooth gameplay and multitasking. Ideal for gamers and streamers.

title: Razer DeathAdder V3

title: HyperX Cloud Alpha Headset
description: High-quality gaming headset with clear sound and comfort. Provides immersive audio experience. Great for long gaming sessions.

title: Sony DualSense Controller
description: Advanced controller with haptic feedback and adaptive triggers. Enhances gameplay immersion. Designed for PlayStation users.

title: Mi 20000mAh Power Bank
description: High-capacity power bank with fast charging support. Ideal for long travel and heavy phone usage. Durable build with multiple charging ports.

title: Ambrane 10000mAh Power Bank
description: Compact and lightweight power bank for daily use. Provides reliable backup for smartphones. Easy to carry and efficient performance.

description: Fast charging wall adapter with safe power delivery. Supports multiple devices including smartphones and tablets. Compact and travel-friendly design.

title: Samsung 25W USB-C Charger
description: Official Samsung fast charger with USB-C support. Delivers quick and stable charging performance. Ideal for modern smartphones.

description: Durable USB-C cable with high-speed data transfer. Built with premium materials for long-lasting usage. Supports fast charging.

description: Convenient wireless charging pad for compatible devices. Sleek design with anti-slip surface. Easy and cable-free charging experience.

description: Smart LED bulb with app and voice control support. Change colors and brightness easily. Perfect for modern smart homes.

title: TP-Link WiFi Router
description: High-speed WiFi router with strong signal coverage. Suitable for homes and small offices. Easy setup and reliable connectivity.

title: Amazon Echo Dot (Alexa)

title: Fire TV Stick
description: Streaming device that converts any TV into a smart TV. Access OTT platforms and apps easily. Comes with voice remote support.

title: iphone 16
description: The iPhone 16, released on September 20, 2024, is the eighteenth-generation smartphone featuring a 6.1-inch Super Retina XDR OLED display with a 60Hz refresh rate and a resolution of 2556 x 1179 pixels.  It is powered by the Apple A18 chip with 8GB of RAM and offers 128GB, 256GB, or 512GB of storage, housed in an aluminum frame with color-infused glass back available in Ultramarine, Teal, Pink, White, and Black.
